description: Carry threshold >= 1 (all carries). Tests minimum confidence level for carry inclusion.
Carry threshold >= 2 (medium confidence). Winner: best balance of data quality and volume.
Carry threshold >= 3 (high confidence only). Too restrictive: loses too many valid carries.
Context = 2 events. Too short: model lacks positional history. Evaluated on full sequences (ctx=14).
Context = 5 events. Still underfitting: not enough history for sequence patterns.
Context = 8 events. Winner: best ROC-AUC with ~65% data retention.
Context = 10 events. Slight overfitting: more context does not help.
Context = 14 events (full). No truncation: model overfits on long sequences.
Context = 18 events. Padded beyond natural length: padding hurts.
Context = 23 events. Excessive padding: worst of extended contexts.
4 transformer layers. Winner: smallest model generalizes best.
8 transformer layers. Default depth: slight overfitting vs 4 layers.
16 transformer layers. Catastrophic overfitting: model collapses to random (ROC ~ 0.50).
Dual MDN: separate pass and carry heads. Optimal params from Phases 1-3. Reeval with 1000 rollouts.
Single MDN: shared head for pass and carry. Tests if separate carry head adds value. Reeval with 1000 rollouts.
Pass-only baseline: no carry events. Same architecture as best carry model. Tests if carries add value. Reeval with 1000 rollouts.
